title: Brookhaven RP Advanced Secrets & Hidden Features Quiz

questions.q: Which specific key combination allows you to access the secret underground bunker beneath the Church?
a: Press E while standing on the altar
Click the cross three times then press F
Stand behind the podium and press R
There is no secret bunker in the Church

questions.q: What is the maximum number of floors you can build in a custom house plot in Brookhaven RP?
Which vehicle in Brookhaven RP has the unique ability to transform or change its appearance?
a: None of the vehicles can transform

questions.q: In the Secret Agency building, what specific item must you interact with to access the hidden elevator?
Which house in Brookhaven RP contains a secret room accessible only through a hidden passage in the basement?
What is the exact name of the job role that allows you to access restricted areas of the Hospital?
In the School building, which specific classroom contains the secret passage to the hidden area?
Which building in Brookhaven RP has a rooftop that can only be accessed by using the 'fly' feature or specific climbing mechanics?
What happens when you find and interact with all the hidden collectible items scattered throughout the map?
a: You get a unique house decoration
Nothing special happens - there are no collectible items

questions.q: Which specific area of the map contains the abandoned or 'haunted' location that most players don't know about?
a: Under the Bridge near the River
In the Forest past the Camping Area
There is no hidden haunted location
